meta.title: 33.11 Polemonium (Beug)
meta.note: Agent: clean this page, only use pollentabel.json for the choices. If needed update the pollentabel.json with the images in by-taxon. Do not add other than label, next, id, name, pollen_key and incomplete. Check vanderham-pollentabel.json for and example how to format the json.

choices.label: PK striaat, met enkele geisoleerde anastomosen tussen de valla (Tabel 114: 11-13).
